summary: Verified 3 new WhatsApp features: 1) Order edit triggers order_updated notification, 2) WhatsApp send button removed from Orders page, 3) Payment reminder uses backend API template. All 10 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: send_whatsapp_order_updated function exists in notifications.py (line 322) and is called from orders_admin.py (line 652)
VERIFIED: send_whatsapp_payment_reminder function exists in notifications.py (line 381) and is called from payments.py (line 179)
VERIFIED: order_updated and payment_reminder templates exist in DEFAULT_WA_TEMPLATES (templates.py lines 117-130)
VERIFIED: MessageSquare icon is imported but NOT used in order action buttons (Orders.jsx)
VERIFIED: No wa.me links in Payments.jsx - all WhatsApp buttons use paymentsAPI.sendReminder
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new WhatsApp features verified: 1) PUT /api/orders/{id}/items triggers order_updated WhatsApp notification (confirmed via WhatsApp logs showing message_type='order_updated'), 2) Orders page no longer has WhatsApp send button in actions or print modal, 3) Payments page uses backend API for payment reminders (no wa.me links). All templates (order_updated, payment_reminder) are in DEFAULT_WA_TEMPLATES.

features_tested.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Returns access_token and user object
features_tested.GET /api/message-templates: PASS - Includes order_updated and payment_reminder templates
features_tested.POST /api/payments/send-reminder: PASS - Validates input and sends template-based WhatsApp
features_tested.PUT /api/orders/{id}/items: PASS - Updates items and triggers order_updated notification
features_tested.GET /api/whatsapp-logs: PASS - Shows order_updated and payment_reminder logs
features_tested.Orders page actions: PASS - No WhatsApp button (only View, Edit, Print, Update Status, Transfer, Delete)
features_tested.Orders print modal: PASS - No 'Send WhatsApp' button (only Close and Print)
features_tested.Payments outstanding table: PASS - WhatsApp reminder is <button> not <a href='wa.me'>
features_tested.Payments ledger dialog: PASS - Remind button is <button> not <a href='wa.me'>

whatsapp_logs_evidence.order_updated: Message sent successfully: 'Hello Dr.LOKESH, Your order *ORD-20260405-0001* has been *UPDATED*...'
whatsapp_logs_evidence.payment_reminder: Message sent: 'Hello Test Customer, This is a friendly reminder regarding your outstanding balance of *Rs. 5,000.50*...'

mocked_apis_note: NO MOCKS - All APIs are real
